# Aaron Roy

> Product leader and builder based in Brooklyn, NY. I write about product management, building with AI (Claude Code, MCP servers, prompt engineering), side projects, 3D printing, cycling, and startups. Currently Product Director at Manychat and co-founder of Wami.

I'm a product person by trade — not an engineer, but increasingly technical through AI tooling. I tend to build something and then write about what I learned: how it works, what it cost, what broke, and what I'd do differently. This site collects that writing.

## About

- [About Aaron Roy](https://aaronroy.com/about/): Career (Manychat, Teachable, Bond/Wami, 3DPrinterOS), background, and how to get in touch.

## Featured writing

- [How to build a personal morning briefing](https://aaronroy.com/how-to-build-a-personal-morning-briefing/): A hands-on workshop recap, with the prompts and examples to build your own scheduled AI briefing.
- [Giving agents personal context](https://aaronroy.com/giving-agents-personal-context/): Bringing my voice, opinions, and expertise into LLMs with a simple markdown-over-MCP system.
- [GlutenOrNot: a free ingredient scanner for celiac disease](https://aaronroy.com/glutenornot-free-ingredient-scanner-celiac-disease/): A free app that reads ingredient labels and tells you if something contains gluten — photo to verdict, no accounts.
- [Experiments with Strava MCP](https://aaronroy.com/experiments-with-strava-mcp/): Connecting Claude to eight years of cycling data via the Strava MCP server, with a setup tutorial.
- [Building products in the age of AI](https://aaronroy.com/building-products-age-of-ai/): A talk for NYU's Product Management Club on how AI changes what product people can build.
- [Making migrations fun with Claude Code](https://aaronroy.com/making-migrations-fun-with-claude-code/): How I migrated this blog from WordPress to Astro in about six hours with Claude Code.
- [Vibe coding a Tour de France app with Replit and Google Sheets](https://aaronroy.com/vibe-coding-a-tour-de-france-app-using-replit-and-google-sheets/): Building a fantasy cycling UI without being an engineer.
- [The twisting tale of our handwriting robots](https://aaronroy.com/the-twisting-tale-of-our-handwriting-robots/): How a fleet of handwriting robots ended up in a Bushwick studio — the Bond/Wami story.
- [How to stay ahead of online scammers](https://aaronroy.com/how-to-stay-ahead-of-online-scammers/): A practical security guide for non-technical readers.

## Projects

- [GlutenOrNot](https://glutenornot.com): Free celiac ingredient scanner (web + iOS), built with Claude.
- [Wami](https://wami.io): Handwriting-robot company I co-founded — luxury-brand notes at scale, run out of Bushwick.
- [personal-context](https://github.com/amr05008/personal-context): Open-source MCP server that gives LLMs my voice, opinions, and expertise.
